race.comment: MIDWEST (2) looks a good price here. He's a speedy horse who needs control up front and the opposite of that occurred first up in the WJ Adams Stakes at Caulfield, sitting between Way To The Stars & Beast Mode in a line of three. He stuck on okay there and arguably his best win to date came down the straight when let rip in this exact race last year. BRIDAL WALTZ (1) resumes, scratched from last week's Oakleigh Plate. She has to give weight to the boys but her form last time warrants it, only beaten by War Machine here fresh, albeit over 1200m. Whether 1000m is on the sharp side remains to be seen. The 3yo MCGAW (4) resumes. He took on some of the top 3yos last time in, a win over My Gladiola & Tentyris in a Danehill leaping off the page. He was found out at that level later in the campaign but will take plenty of beating here. CELUI (3) beat a good horse fresh at Randwick and should take beating again. PERILOUS FIGHTER (10) next best.
